variants: Hamish Drummond, originally from Highberry Town, is a graduate of the Northstar School of Medicine, where he honed his skills in medical science. Currently, he is employed at Ironforge Bioworks, focusing on the intricate Japanese writing system as part of his role. Beyond his professional life, Hamish contributes to the community as a dedicated member of the Local History Champion Fernfield Society, actively promoting and engaging with the region's historical narratives. His diverse interests and commitment to both medicine and local heritage are central to his identity.
